letterhead.subline: Advanced Research Directorate - Personnel Dossier System

footer.notice: Internal use only / Unauthorized disclosure is a federal offense
footer.hint: Data lives in memory - use Export File to save your campaign as JSON.

character.subject: Subject:
character.newPrompt: Subject name (leave blank to assign later):
character.mustRemain: At least one dossier must remain on file.
character.destroyConfirm: Destroy this personnel file? Export first if you want a copy.
character.noneOnFile: No personnel on file. Create one to begin.

archive.note: Wiki seed: each record is a freely editable markdown article. Extend by adding records for divisions, NPCs, Geists, cases, and locations - or add new collections in the DB.

operations.meta: Operations file / case rhythm: Investigation -> Conclusion -> Preparation -> Clash
operations.note: Session manager seed: one record per case or session. Escalate through deeper impossibility, not bigger monsters. Each case should quietly feed the keystone project.

status.signalNote: Click pips to spend or recover. Temp max modifier:
status.karmaPrompt:
Karma moves only through a Karma-Moving Act.
Record the act (telegraphed, deliberate, irreversible):
status.harmNote: Overflow: full Minor -> Serious; full Serious -> Critical. No death save - consequence follows from fiction.

gm.title: GM Classified Dossier
gm.redactedNotice: CONTENTS REDACTED - enable GM Mode to read or edit. Hidden information creates context and consequence; it never contradicts the visible sheet.

cards.destroyConfirm: Destroy this record? This cannot be undone.

empty.marks: No marks or hauntings on file.
empty.log: Log is empty. Entries are added after completed cases.

characterCreation.caption: Character Creation
head: Step
Action
rows: Choose Role / Occupation (domain package, gear, access)
Apply Domain package; may move 1 point; none above 2
Fill Harm, Mental State, Identity, Relationships

harm.caption: Harm
head: Slot
Effect
rows: Hurt but functioning; usually no penalty
Cannot act normally without help, Signal, or cost
Minor full -> Serious; Serious full -> Critical
Mark 1 relevant Protection Slot: reduce severity by one

designSpine.caption: Design Spine
rows: the path the soul has walked
begin as tools; the sheet records how they become people

attributes.name: Corpo
attributes.desc: Physical force, endurance, coordination, bodily resilience.

attributes.name: Mente
attributes.desc: Reasoning, memory, analysis, technical understanding, patterns.

attributes.name: Carisma
attributes.desc: Presence, persuasion, empathy, social intuition, performance.

attributes.name: Vontade
attributes.desc: Composure, identity, focus, resistance, inner stability.

domains.name: Physical
domains.desc: Running, climbing, forcing, carrying, resisting strain.

domains.name: Fieldwork
domains.desc: Stealth, awareness, tracking, searching dangerous spaces.

domains.name: Research
domains.desc: Archives, documents, case theory, pattern reconstruction.

domains.name: Technical
domains.desc: Machines, electronics, medical procedure, device repair.

domains.name: Occult
domains.desc: Ritual logic, Geist lore, Resonance theory, forbidden texts.

domains.name: Combat
domains.desc: Tactical violence, restraint, fighting under pressure.

sections.title: Identity
sections.note: Keep the character human. The supernatural complicates identity - it does not replace it.

sections.title: Occupation / Role
sections.note: Occupation is how Eidolon labels the character. It may not match how they see themselves.

sections.title: Attributes
sections.note: Assign +3, +2, +1, +0 at creation. Attributes define natural approach; Domains define trained competence. Core roll: d20 + Attribute + Domain >= Difficulty.

sections.title: Domains
sections.note: Default spread: one at 2, three at 1, three at 0; the player may move one point. No starting domain above 2. Scale: 0 untrained, 1 trained, 2 expert, 3 exceptional.

sections.title: Signal & Anchor
sections.note: Signal Max = Vontade + 2 (computed in the status panel). Signal is clean human frequency - spend it to stay yourself, not as generic reroll fuel. Recovers through grounding, not sleep alone.

sections.title: Resonance
sections.note: Current % and stage live in the status panel. Stages are unlock keys and narrative pressure, not automatic penalties. Starting: 0% default, 10% minor prior exposure (GM-approved), 20% Resonant Subject.

sections.title: Karma
sections.note: Karma moves only through transparent Karma-Moving Acts - always telegraphed. Crossing zero is a story event, not a build option. Path limits are set on the ruler in the status panel.

sections.title: Eidolon Access
sections.note: Access is institutional permission and dependency - not Karma. It must be useful before it is threatening.

sections.title: Harm & Recovery
sections.note: Wound slots live in the status panel. Overflow: full Minor -> next becomes Serious; full Serious -> next becomes Critical. Serious wounds: -2 when directly interfering. Eidolon medical help works - and creates records, monitoring, debt, and dependency.

sections.title: Armor / Protection
sections.note: Mark one relevant Protection Slot to reduce a wound by one severity (Critical->Serious, Serious->Minor, Minor->ignored).

sections.title: Mental State
sections.note: Light and narrative - there is no sanity HP track. Pressure shows through Signal loss, Anchor stress, symptoms, and consequences.

sections.title: Techniques & Skill Cards
sections.note: Position-Gated techniques require visible conditions and do not move Karma. Investment techniques move Karma when unlocked or used - rare and defining. Soft requirements never hide secret numbers.

sections.title: Gear Registry
sections.note: Gear is external infrastructure; techniques are trained use. Carrying a device does not grant its techniques. Eidolon power is procedural - and traceable.

sections.title: Pact Addendum
sections.note: One major pact at a time. Forming one costs Resonance (+10% limited, +15% deep, +20% possessive). Apparitions cannot grant pacts; Lesser Geists leave marks and debts instead. A pact is a relationship, not an equipped spell.

sections.title: Exposure / Haunting Addendum
sections.note: Geist Marks are minor supernatural consequences - small but memorable. A mark can become a clue, a soft requirement, a pact seed, or a liability under observation.

sections.title: Incident / Advancement Log
sections.note: Three lanes - Mundane Growth (what I learned), Technique Acquisition (what I can do), Karma Movement (what I have become). One advancement opportunity per completed case; the GM offers 2-3 grounded options.

identity.appearance: Practical clothes under a maintenance coat; permanent solder burns on both hands.
identity.motivation: Pay off her brother's debt before Eidolon decides it owns him too.
identity.fear: Becoming useful enough that they never let her leave.
identity.background: Civilian electronics repair, recruited after fixing a device she was never supposed to see working.
identity.relationships: Tomas Vasquez (brother, indebted); Supervisor Hale (handler, Engineering).
identity.whyEidolonCares: Useful technical labor; not trusted with full theory.

occupation.description: Low-clearance technical employee assigned to maintain, calibrate, and troubleshoot unstable field equipment.
occupation.startingGear: Diagnostic meter, insulated tool kit, restricted maintenance badge, calibration notebook.
occupation.notes: Permitted: maintenance areas, assigned devices, basic field support.

signal.anchor: Every morning: black coffee and a written schedule.
signal.recoveryNotes: Recovers when she keeps the morning routine, or when Tomas calls.

access.scope: Maintenance areas, assigned devices, basic field support
access.restricted: Theoretical Harmonics wing, Subject Management, Archives B-level
access.gearSupport: Standard repair and replacement through Engineering requisition

groundYourself.name: Ground Yourself
groundYourself.effect: Spend 1 Signal to hold identity steady through a brief resonance surge, false memory, Geist pressure, panic spiral, or emotional bleed.
groundYourself.softReq: You must be able to name yourself, access your Anchor, or be grounded by another character.

readStatic.name: Read the Static
readStatic.effect: When examining a resonant site, object, or person, ask the GM one basic question about emotional residue, dominant feeling, or recent spectral disturbance.
readStatic.cost: Gain 1-5% Resonance or accept a minor symptom.
readStatic.hardReq: Touched Resonance or access to basic Eidolon detection equipment.
readStatic.softReq: The scene must contain meaningful resonant residue.
readStatic.risk: The answer may come through sensation rather than clean information.

resonantCell.name: Resonant Cell Mk.I
resonantCell.func: Stores Resonance externally and powers compatible Eidolon techniques.

gm.trueReason: Blood sample flagged compatible with battery containment trials (Batch 7).
gm.handlerAgenda: Hale reports her error rates to Theoretical Harmonics, not Engineering.
gm.factionInterest: An Echologist cell has noticed her repair signatures on purged sites.
gm.npcTrust: Motor pool crew trusts her; lab staff treat her as expendable.
gm.futureConsequence: A protocol may carry her name into the 1990s files.

archive.title: Eidolon (1970s)
archive.body:
A classified, government-linked research project - not yet the public technological giant of the 1990s. Its science is promising, its methods secretive, its ambitions far larger than most personnel understand.

Knowledge is compartmentalized in tiers: base personnel see classified-but-bland work; lower-mid staff know impossible things occur; upper-mid staff know Resonance touches consciousness and identity; only the inner circle understands the keystone project and the Great Transcendent.

Design rule: Eidolon must be tempting. It produces real good, real progress, and real protection - otherwise refusing it is too easy.

archive.title: Welderhide
archive.body:
A high-elevation mining city ringed by mountains. Three overlapping reasons it matters:

**GEOLOGICAL** - the mountains, mines, and mineral formations act as a natural resonant chamber, amplifying and stabilizing Resonance and producing more naturally resonant individuals.

**ECONOMIC** - the mines are failing. The city is desperate to diversify, which makes it politically and financially receptive to Eidolon's investment. Conquest through dependency: it should look like salvation.

**HISTORICAL** - it is where Adrian Voss first touched the Great Transcendent in the 1920s. To him, Welderhide is sacred. The origin point.

archive.title: Adrian Voss
archive.body:
Founder of Eidolon. Not originally a superhuman genius - his transformation began in the Welderhide mines in the 1920s, where his consciousness made contact with the Great Transcendent.

He wants to solve mortality. He sees death, aging, grief, and loss as flaws to correct. The horror is that his cure does not preserve humanity - it freezes it: no death, but no growth, change, or future.

His mistake is not identifying suffering as a problem. It is believing he has the right to answer on behalf of everyone.

archive.title: The Great Transcendent
archive.body:
A sovereign-level Geist tied to the most dangerous horizon of Eidolon work. In the 1970s it should remain a deep gravitational presence, not a revealed antagonist - fragments, theological language buried in scientific notes, impossible data, strange executive behavior.

The players only need to understand enough to realize: whatever Eidolon is building, it is not truly for us.

archive.title: Geists
archive.body:
Born from human emotion, shaped by human beings - but extradimensional and alien because they are too pure. A Geist is a human emotion extrapolated beyond human limits.

A Geist of grief does not move on. A Geist of hope does not give up. A Geist of love does not let go. A Geist of fear does not calm down.

Thesis: they are so human that they become alien.

Tiers: Apparition (no pact) -> Lesser (marks, debts, hauntings) -> Greater (true pact) -> Sovereign (identity-shaping pact).

archive.title: Resonance & Signal
archive.body:
Resonance is how much the impossible has entered you. Signal is how clearly you can still answer back as yourself.

Resonance (0-100%) is contamination, fuel, and classification risk. Stages are unlock keys and narrative tone, not automatic penalties: Clear -> Touched -> Atravessado -> Marked -> Consumed -> Echo/Lost.

Signal (Max = Vontade + 2) is spent to resist Geist influence, stabilize identity, power Echologist techniques, and pull others back. It recovers through grounding - Anchor, human choices, refusal of temptation, safe downtime - not sleep alone.

Central rule: Resonance can be good for humanity, but never for free.

archive.title: Karma & the Three Paths
archive.body:
Karma is a signed integer (-5 to +5): how far down a metaphysical path the soul has walked. Not XP, not morality, not reputation. It moves only through transparent Karma-Moving Acts, always telegraphed by the GM.

**OCCULT EDEN (-1 to -5)** - Accumulate. Consumes Resonance as fuel. Communion, intimacy with the dead. Failure mode: powerful but increasingly distant from ordinary humanity.

**EIDOLON (0)** - Channel. Routes Resonance through gear: bank, store, discharge. Failure mode: dependency on access, calibration, and the institution.

**ECHOLOGIST (+1 to +5)** - Purge. Uses Signal and clean frequency to reduce or weaponize the absence of Resonance. Failure mode: the deepest purifiers must touch what they hate to destroy it.

Hard reversals after real commitment leave Contradiction Scars that lower the ceiling on the opposite path.

archive.title: Factions as Philosophical Alignments
archive.body:
Factions are alignments, not adventuring teams - the squad stays operationally together while disagreeing about what their work means.

Eidolon-aligned: humanity survives through CONTROL. Effective, organized, morally compromised.
Echologist-aligned: humanity survives through ADAPTATION. Principled, fragmented, possibly reckless.
Occult Eden-aligned: humanity survives through UNDERSTANDING. Insightful, empathetic, dangerous.

Opposing Eidolon should not automatically mean finding the correct answer.

archive.title: 1970s Campaign Spine
archive.body:
Pitch: a squad of low-ranking or coerced Eidolon assets investigates increasingly impossible Resonance cases, only to realize they are helping build the infrastructure that will let Eidolon decide humanity future without consent.

Emotional hook: "I did not sign up for this, but I have no choice."
Core arc: Asset -> Witness -> Accomplice -> Doubter -> Actor.

Three reveals: (1) The supernatural is real - and Eidolon has forms for it. (2) The cases were never separate. (3) We can choose.

Central lie: "We are developing technologies that will save humanity."
Hidden truth: "We are building infrastructure that will let Eidolon decide humanity future without humanity consent."

Endpoint: not "the network is ready" - but "Oh God. It works."

operations.title: (Template) First Assignment
operations.investigation: What is happening? Strange reports, failing equipment, contradictory witnesses - ambiguity is allowed before the first threshold.
operations.conclusion: What do we think this is?
operations.preparation: Tools, tactics, rituals, permissions, or sacrifices needed.
operations.clash: The direct confrontation, containment, choice, or consequence that resolves the case. After the first threshold, the supernatural is undeniable.
operations.advancementMenu: Offer 2-3 grounded options: one tree technique, one mundane growth, one case-specific reward.
operations.gmNotes: Seed one clue pointing at the keystone project.
